Tummy

2025年6月15日

Tummy

2025年6月15日 · Monday

Tummy 到家的第一天

两个月大，小小的，抱起来都怕弄疼它。一放到地上，就开始跟着我走。Talkie 和薯条起初有些警惕，绕着它打量——但 Tummy 完全不在乎，继续跟着我。

Two months old, so small I was afraid to hold too tight. The moment I put it down, it started following me. Talkie and French Fry circled warily — but Tummy didn't care, just kept following.
